name: Improper Neutralization of Substitution Characters
description: The product does not properly neutralize substitution characters (e.g., $, %, {{}}, backtick) in user input that a downstream component interprets as variable or expression substitution triggers, allowing attackers to inject variable references or expressions.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user-controlled data containing substitution trigger characters ($, %, {{}}) that flows to EXTERNAL[template_engine|shell|interpreter] without a TRANSFORM[substitution_escape] that escapes or quotes the substitution characters
